title: 府中ウマ娘Sの後に・理想、見据えて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, it's Mejiro Dober! She's taken first!
That's right, folks! Mejiro Dober has claimed
victory!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! Mejiro Dober is on a totally different
level today!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober... You're so radiant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Mejiro Dober! That was a
spectacular race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you. But I'm not satisfied with just this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There is still a goal I want to achieve, or rather,
an ideal I wish to surpass.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
An ideal, you say! Could you tell us who that
might be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Now is the time to make my intentions loud and
clear and show everyone what I can do.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I wish to challenge Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I want to do that at the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Please watch over my performance and witness
my victory as Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's so cool! I won't miss that race for the
world!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text: Dober! You're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, I think I may have laid it on a bit too thick
just now... I'm starting to feel embarrassed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're like a broken record. You've said that so
many times, it's completely lost its meaning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm just joking. Gullible much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm just joking! I appreciate it. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Now we just have to prepare for the big day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Now we just have to prepare for the big day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait for me, Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is right around the
corner!
